caption: The video begins with a close-up of the emblem of the Indian Institute of Technology Bombay (IIT Bombay), prominently displayed against a dynamic, blue-lit background that creates a sense of depth and movement. The emblem features a lotus flower above an open book, symbolizing knowledge and enlightenment, encircled by a gear-like border with the institute's name inscribed in both English and Hindi. As the sequence progresses, the camera remains focused on the emblem, but the text "IIT BOMBAY" fades in below it, reinforcing the identity of the institution. The overall visual presentation is sleek and professional, emphasizing the prestige and academic excellence associated with IIT Bombay.
